<script setup lang="ts">
import { onMounted } from 'vue';

// 确保 jQuery 和 theiaStickySidebar 已经正确加载
onMounted(() => {
    if (typeof jQuery !== 'undefined' && jQuery.fn.theiaStickySidebar) {
        jQuery(document).ready(function () {
            jQuery('#Sidebar').theiaStickySidebar({
                additionalMarginTop: 120
            });
        });
    } else {
        console.error('jQuery or theiaStickySidebar is not loaded');
    }
});
</script>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { onMounted } from 'vue';

// 确保 jQuery 和 theiaStickySidebar 已经正确加载
onMounted(() => {
    if (typeof jQuery !== 'undefined' && jQuery.fn.theiaStickySidebar) {
        jQuery(document).ready(function () {
            jQuery('#Sidebar').theiaStickySidebar({
                additionalMarginTop: 120
            });
        });
    } else {
        console.error('jQuery or theiaStickySidebar is not loaded');
    }
});
</script>
